chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-930 / 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ DIRECTIONS. For orders as to maintainability of this Petition. 05.05.2025. Mr. Imran Iqbal Khan holding brief for Mr. M. Saad Shafiq Siddiqui, Advocate for Petitioner. ________________ That on the last date of hearing an objection was raised as to maintainability of this Petition and today, Counsel is not available to assist the Court. In view of such piston, Petition is dismissed for non- prosecution. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/

In view of such piston, Petition is dismissed for non- prosecution. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/ ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-930 / 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on Misc. No. 4956/2025. 2) For orders on office objection No. 01, 02 & 23. 3) For orders on Misc. No. 4957/2025. 4) For orders on Misc. No. 4958/2025. 5) For hearing of main case. 14.04.2025. Mr. M. Saad Shafiq Siddiqui, Advocate for Petitioner. ________________ 1) Granted. 2 to 5) Counsel is directed to come prepared and satisfy as to maintainability of this Petition on the next date. To come up on 05.05.2025. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
